description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named makemhr that triggers on push to utils/makemhr/** and .github/workflows/makemhr.yml, and allows manual dispatch. For a Windows job, check out the code, get the current date and commit hash, clone libmysofa, add MSBuild to PATH, restore and build libmysofa NuGet packages, configure and build with CMake, collect artifacts, upload a makemhr artifact, compress artifacts, and create a GitHub pre-release.
